fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Graph browser coverage exercises default hierarchical/isometric layout, layout switching, and restoration of the default layout. 2. Graph browser coverage exercises zoom-driven node LOD changes and verifies the active node remains rich while smaller tiers remain interactive. 3. The added coverage runs in the existing ticket-viewer release Playwright suite.

fields.implementation_summary: Extended the graph-detail-sidebar Playwright release suite with a layout/projection restore regression that switches away from the default hierarchical orthographic view and verifies the graph returns to top-to-bottom hierarchy ordering, plus zoom-driven LOD coverage that proves compact or minimal graph nodes remain clickable and promote the selected node back to rich detail.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer] Add graph review E2E coverage
fields.validation_summary: Passed viewer-ctl stop ticket-viewer && cd memory-viewers/ticket-viewer/frontend/dioxus && npm run test:e2e:release -- graph-detail-sidebar.spec.ts.
